channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Bitcoin shows 2-cent price on Revolut as users report apparent BTC display glitch
item.description: Screenshots showed BTC briefly far below global market prices, though it remains unclear whether any trades were executed at those levels or whether the move was a display issue.

item.title: S&P 500 call options volume surges to record $2.6 trillion. Here's what it means for bitcoin
item.description: As Wall Street chases upside in stocks like never before, the implications for bitcoin appear bullish, though with an important caveat.

item.title: Zcash to roll out quantum-recoverable wallets within a month, go quantum-proof by 2027
item.description: Bitcoin no longer holds up as the cypherpunk-grade money it was meant to be, Zcash's Zooko Wilcox told an engaged audience.

item.title: Arbitrum approves $71 Million ETH release despite U.S. seizure fight
item.description: DAO delegates approved releasing exploit-frozen ETH to an Aave-led recovery effort, though Arbitrum’s governance rules delay any transfer for at least eight days

item.title: Bitcoin slips below $80,000: Why the 'Trump rally' is hitting a wall of profit-taking
item.description: CryptoQuant says traders are cashing out into strength, Enflux ties the move to easing Hormuz tensions, while Glassnode argues bitcoin has reclaimed key levels needed for a broader recovery.

item.title: CLARITY Act support carries electoral boost, HarrisX poll finds
item.description: The poll found 52% of registered voters support the CLARITY Act, with 47% willing to cross party lines for a candidate who backs the bill.

item.title: Zcash gains 70% in a week amid growing interest in crypto privacy
item.description: Swyftx’s Pav Hundal says Zcash is surging amid concerns about artificial intelligence, quantum computing and financial surveillance.

item.title: US sentences ‘laptop farmers’ tied to North Korean IT worker scheme
item.description: The Justice Department said two men were sentenced for hosting laptops used by North Korean IT workers, bringing the total to eight sentences in five months.

item.title: Aptos commits $50M to AI agent infrastructure push
item.description: The Aptos Foundation said building infrastructure that enables sub-second finality without the need for human intervention is a key to supporting the next wave of AI agent adoption.

item.title: Consensus panelists explain why Perp DEXes remain a tough sell for institutional investors
item.description: Panelists at Consensus Miami said institutional investors are still largely absent from perp DEXs, citing security risks and KYC friction as key barriers.

item.title: JUST IN: Coinbase crypto trading remains down for over 5 hours as outage continues. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFB4ZnFaU1AwRUV1S0hSTU1jMzlzcjJtTDBjN05sSEZFai12WHN2Y3JVcWJJUlRuTThsY2FqNXVDTlNRTy0zeXVYRXp4MmVhNkIyS1hKbVc5eDdKOWtSUGdqRjNB?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Coinbase crypto trading r…

item.title: AWS Northern Virginia data center overheats, impacting Coinbase
item.description: Coinbase said on Friday its markets are being placed in “cancel only” mode but will begin to re-enable trading “shortly.”

item.title: AI agents could solve crypto’s user problem
item.description: Chappy Asel says autonomous software may be more natural users of wallets and stablecoins than humans, though agentic payments remain mostly theoretical.

item.title: Chaos Labs says oracles secure after attempted ‘nation-state’ wallet attack
item.description: Chaos Labs said it rotated all keys after the weekend attack attempt and has not detected further suspicious activity.

item.title: Bitcoin slips to $79,000, DOGE leads majors losses as negative funding rates set 10-year record
item.description: Bitcoin pulled back from this week's $81,500 high after U.S. forces fired on Iranian targets, while crypto futures markets logged their 67th straight day of negative funding rates, the longest streak in a decade per K33 Research.

item.title: Coinbase Exchange Has Been Down for Over Two Hours Coinbase Exchange has been experiencing an outage for over two hours. Its status page says some users may be unable to trade or may experience degraded performance due to an AWS outage. Coi - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE90Ulk1Q2ZsOTQzSzZ3dzBZdnI4ZHlTTzZ1QnUyUzd3SWFmTGRvSVZURkpiTk1yLWE4ZmdmM2NWSUgwc1dfTERZd2pTWUpqVXNVQU5hZVB5eHpBNHpsdlhvMnBMcw?oc=5" target="_blank">Coinbase Exchange Has Been Down …

item.title: Coinbase shares slide on $400M Q1 loss, revenue miss
item.description: Coinbase financial chief Alesia Haas said “macro conditions were genuinely tough,” while CEO Brian Armstrong highlighted a plan to diversify beyond spot trading.

item.title: Block Inc rises 8% as Q1 gives ‘earnings surprise’ despite Bitcoin dip
item.description: Block’s Q1 earnings beat estimates despite Bitcoin revenue falling 26% on changing Bitcoin “trading dynamics” and reducing fees on Cash App transactions.

item.title: Bitcoin bulls target $115K by December: Does data back the expectation?
item.description: Bitcoin options show bulls targeting $115,000 by year-end but are traders becoming overly optimistic?

item.title: US Treasury ‘privately demanded’ Binance comply with monitoring deal: Report
item.description: US Treasury officials reportedly sent a letter to Binance pressing the crypto exchange on compliance with a 2023 deal, after reports circulated that the company had facilitated transactions linked to Iran.

item.title: Solv Protocol Will Dump LayerZero, Migrate $700M Tokenized Bitcoin Tech to Chainlink
item.description: Solv Protocol will move its tokenized Bitcoin infrastructure to Chainlink, following Kelp DAO's lead after it blamed LayerZero for a hack.

item.title: CLARITY Act markup could happen as early as next week: Coinbase exec
item.description: The provisions in the crypto market structure bill are still under review by the banking and crypto lobbies as a new poll shows bipartisan voter support for the legislation.

item.title: Trump Sons Haven't Abandoned World Liberty Financial, Crypto Firm Insists
item.description: World Liberty co-founder Zach Witkoff also said Thursday that the crypto firm is “in the final stages” of receiving bank charter approval from the Trump administration.

item.title: Bitcoin exchange reserves fall to two-year low after $8B exodus
item.description: Nearly 100,000 Bitcoin exited major exchanges as OTC balances tightened and demand from accumulator addresses increased by 60%, pointing to reduced liquid supply.

item.title: Coinbax wins $20,000 PitchFest prize at Consensus Miami for stablecoin compliance
item.description: Coinbax took the top spot at Consensus Miami with software built to add compliance controls to onchain payments.

item.title: Crypto PACs spend $7.2M to support candidates in 5 US states ahead of elections
item.description: Two affiliates of the crypto-backed PAC Fairshake reported media buys for political candidates in Georgia, Alabama, Nebraska, Kentucky and Texas this week.

item.title: Coinbase Shares Slide as Crypto Giant Reports $394 Million Q1 Loss
item.description: Crypto exchange Coinbase reported a consecutive quarterly loss as transaction revenue plummeted 40% amid a volatile market.

item.title: Privacy and accountability can coexist onchain, say panelists at Consensus Miami
item.description: Public blockchains make transactions traceable, but that transparency can come at the expense of user privacy. Speakers from Moody’s Ratings and ChangeNOW said that hybrid blockchain architecture and address-level monitoring can help solve…

item.title: AI agents and large corporates will lead the next stablecoin boom, executives say
item.description: Stablecoins are entering a new phase of adoption, with large corporations using them for cross-border treasury flows while AI agents begin using blockchain rails for autonomous payments, Bridge and Deus X Capital executives said at Consens…

item.title: Fund managers double down on Bitcoin as crypto sentiment rebounds — CoinShares
item.description: Institutional investors are gradually increasing crypto exposure as Bitcoin leads allocation preferences amid rising fund inflows and improving market sentiment.

item.title: Tom Lee Says BitMine May Slow Ethereum Buys After Amassing Nearly $12 Billion of ETH
item.description: Leading Ethereum treasury firm BitMine Immersion Technologies may start slowing its ETH purchases as it approaches its 5% supply goal.

item.title: Chrome Deleted Its Own Privacy Promise for Sneaky On-Device AI
item.description: Chrome is quietly installing a 4GB AI on your devices. And now, its latest version has removed the disclosure that promised to keep your data off Google’s servers.

item.title: Coinbase stock declines 5% after missing Q1 estimates on crypto slowdown
item.description: The crypto platform missed on the top and bottom lines as falling digital asset prices weighed on trading activity and investor sentiment.

item.title: There’s a generational shift happening, and Coinbase is uniquely positioned to capture it: 1) The onchain economy has reached escape velocity 2) Coinbase's full stack platform is powering it 3) The next frontier is agentic and on Coinbase Our thesis is simple: - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE9pMTJDbVNfbk1vODN3RTMydU92d3FETHRoZGR4eXhOWlNsRUd1dVVacy1leUJvQWVwNjQ1V2d3YjliMEpNcUVTYWF0Um8wRXo0U24yaGdRRDhBVzh4SWhndE9tS2NOekE?oc=5" target="_blank">There’s a generational shif…

item.title: Bitcoin slips below $80K despite BTC ETF inflows topping $1B
item.description: Bitcoin hit resistance at $82,800, triggering a drop below $80,000, but a $1.105 billion weekly inflow into spot BTC ETFs could slow sellers.

item.title: IMF Warns AI Will Supercharge Cyberattacks on Global Financial System
item.description: The IMF called for treating cybersecurity as a core stability issue as new AI tools let even unskilled attackers breach critical infrastructure.

item.title: The Trump family crypto project quietly cashed in while regular investors got stuck holding the bag. Any crypto legislation that doesn’t shut down this presidential corruption and protect investors isn’t worth the paper it’s written on. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTFBZbktDRlA3QXpabmJWNXk2NGgtQlpGU0xPNkJPS3FWTmVpUGxoVGdzUVJXRm5zT2JvTXRqYldqYVNseDFJTWpTTG5GdUtZR3pYcGNWYWFDd09nblFmU1FN?oc=5" target="_blank">The Trump family crypto project quietl…

item.title: Your AI Chatbot May Be Leaking Your Chats to Meta, TikTok and Google
item.description: A new study finds ChatGPT, Claude, Grok, and Perplexity all share user data with third-party ad trackers—sometimes even when you say no to cookies.

item.title: CZ floats Binance.US revival to give U.S. users access to global crypto liquidity
item.description: The Binance founder said BNB Chain is the optimal payments rail for automated transactions between AI agents, noting that U.S. crypto policies are improving.

item.title: 21Shares Debuts First ETF Focused on Canton Network Crypto Token
item.description: The Nasdaq-listed fund offers exposure to Canton Coin, native token of the privacy-focused institutional blockchain network.

item.title: Tether executive warns the 2026 midterms could have 'seismic impact' on crypto industry
item.description: Jesse Spiro, Head of Government Affairs at Tether, said at Consensus Miami 2026 that the midterms will be a key test for whether crypto’s recent policy gains in Washington can survive politically.

item.title: Bitcoin Dips Below $80K as Analysts Say Profit-Taking Is on the Rise
item.description: Bitcoin briefly fell below $80,000 on Thursday as analysts say profit taking has increased among crypto traders.

item.title: Bitmine to slow down ether purchases as it nears accumulation goal, Tom Lee says
item.description: At the current pace of purchases, Lee said his Ethereum treasury giant would reach its 5% ether accumulation goal in six weeks, then shift its focus to staking and share buybacks.

item.title: 'DeFi is not dead,' it’s going mainstream with AI agents, crypto executives agree
item.description: DeFi and its underlying technology have already proved themselves at scale, said eToro CEO Yoni Assia.

item.title: Donald Trump Jr. denies rumors World Liberty Financial is falling apart
item.description: World Liberty Financial co-founder Donald Trump Jr. and co-founder and CEO Zach Witkoff pushed back on recent online rumors as the crypto firm battles Justin Sun in court.

item.title: Kalshi valuation doubles to $22B after $1B funding round
item.description: Backing from Wall Street and Silicon Valley firms signals growing investor interest in regulated event trading despite mounting legal scrutiny.

item.title: Trump-Backed American Bitcoin Shares Fall After $82 Million Q1 Loss
item.description: Shares in Eric Trump's mining firm American Bitcoin have fallen more than 9% after reporting a quarterly loss of nearly $82 million.

item.title: Samson Mow defends Strategy selling portions of its Bitcoin treasury
item.description: The Bitcoin advocate spoke up after Michael Saylor signaled that the company might sell some BTC, a major departure from the Strategy founder's previous rhetoric.

item.title: Amazon’s new AI wallet: AWS, Coinbase, and Stripe build payment rails for bots
item.description: Amazon said AI agents for now will be allowed to buy APIs, web content and other online services, but that future versions would enable hotel bookings, travel reservations and payments to merchants.

item.title: Bitcoin ending May above $76,000 would confirm new bull market, Tom Lee says
item.description: Tokenization and AI agentic finance are the main narratives driving the next bull cycle in crypto, Lee said at Consensus 2026.

item.title: The stablecoin queue: 20 banks and tech giants are waiting to issue tokens with Anchorage Digital
item.description: Since the Genius Act passed, Anchorage has won every single large stablecoin issuance mandate across the landscape, according to the firm’s CEO Nathan McCauley.

item.title: Amazon Teams With Coinbase and Stripe to Let AI Agents Pay With Stablecoins
item.description: The new Amazon Web Services system lets AI agents use the USDC stablecoin to pay for APIs, data, and online services.

item.title: Crypto Polo Cup returns for its fourth edition in Palm Beach during Consensus Miami week
item.description: Hosted by Luna PR, the fourth edition of the Crypto Polo Cup (CPC) will take place on May 9, 2026, at the Santa Clara Polo Club, alongside Consensus Miami.

item.title: Crypto Prediction Markets Explained: How the Blockchain Is Reshaping Forecasting
item.description: TL;DR Crypto prediction markets use blockchain technology to create liquid platforms for forecasting and hedging real-world events, driving massive growth… The post Crypto Prediction Markets Explained: How the Blockchain Is Reshaping Forec…

item.title: Tether's Medical AI Runs on Your Phone and Outperforms Models 16x Its Size
item.description: QVAC MedPsy squeezes clinical AI onto a smartphone, beating Google's MedGemma-27B on real-world scenarios while using three times fewer compute resources.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Panther Protocol deploys privacy infrastructure on Polygon
item.description: After years of research, engineering, and community collaboration, Panther Protocol Foundation announced that Panther Protocol is now live on Polygon.

item.title: Prediction Market Kalshi Boosts Valuation to $22 Billion With Fresh $1 Billion Investment
item.description: Kalshi has another billion dollars to play with as the U.S. prediction market leader continues to grow at a rapid pace.

item.title: Final Bosu is moving to Ethereum. 14th May. Details in the next post. 🧵 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTFAyRGRMcWw0OENZejlicl9OeGJvbUVVczdFZENDQV8xNkQxcm93NnpLRHBSOGVobU5ocW01R1pxakl2MUFBMWUzd1B5ZGN4WGNnbzJaSnRtMnJnWVh5ZUFxSw?oc=5" target="_blank">Final Bosu is moving to Ethereum. 14…

item.title: Google Found a Way to Make Local AI Up to 3x Faster—No New Hardware Required
item.description: Google's new Multi-Token Prediction drafters can make Gemma 4 run up to 3x faster on your own hardware—no cloud required, and no quality lost.
